evals.prompt: 把 DeepSeek-V4 论文整理成 WhyJ 风格的技术博客笔记，不要写成中性总结。
evals.expected_output: A thesis-first WhyJ-style engineering note with strong mechanism-driven judgment and a hard closing pulse.

evals.prompt: 把一个 vLLM 推理优化报告改写成 WhyJ 风格的博客笔记，保留 tradeoff，不要套话。
evals.expected_output: A dense WhyJ-style engineering note that foregrounds bottlenecks, tradeoffs, and ends with an aggressive pulse.
